subject: humanoid figure in long coat channeling a blinding light burst from their hands, shadowy figure looming behind
description: A figure dressed in a long formal coat leans forward with focused intent, hands cupped together emitting a brilliant white-yellow burst of magical light. The face is lit harshly from below by the light, giving the expression an intense, almost fanatical quality. Behind and above the figure, a large shadowy humanoid form looms indistinctly in a pale fog. The overall palette is cold and washed out except for the central light source.
foreground: figure in long coat channeling light burst from hands
background: pale fog, large shadowy looming figure
